summary: Comprehensive testing of Bulk Category Assignment feature completed successfully. Backend: All 15 API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All bulk category assignment UI flows working correctly - product selection, 3 assignment modes (add/replace/remove), category filtering, and success notifications.

issues: React console warning 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in HashRouter/Login - non-critical, pre-existing issue

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/catalogs/{catalog_id}/products/bulk-categories requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: Bulk ADD mode - adds categories to products successfully
Backend: Bulk ADD mode - categories persist after assignment
Backend: Bulk ADD mode - can add multiple categories at once
Backend: Bulk REPLACE mode - replaces all categories successfully
Backend: Bulk REPLACE mode - clears old categories and sets new ones
Backend: Bulk REMOVE mode - removes specified categories
Backend: Bulk REMOVE mode - categories are actually removed (verified with filter)
Backend: Empty product list rejected with 400 error
Backend: Invalid mode rejected with 400 error
Backend: Invalid category ID rejected with 400 error
Backend: Non-existent catalog returns 404
Backend: REPLACE with empty categories clears all
Backend: ADD is idempotent (no duplicate categories)
Backend: Category filter works after bulk assignment
Frontend: Product checkboxes allow multiple selection
Frontend: 'Asignar a Categorías' button appears when products selected
Frontend: Button shows count of selected products
Frontend: Dialog opens with title 'Asignar Categorías a N Productos'
Frontend: Mode selector shows all 3 modes (Añadir, Reemplazar, Quitar)
Frontend: Category hierarchy displayed with proper indentation (4 levels)
Frontend: Categories show level badges (Nivel 1-4)
Frontend: Selected categories shown in 'Seleccionadas:' section
Frontend: Save button text changes based on mode (Añadir/Reemplazar/Quitar)
Frontend: Success toast shows correct message for each mode
Frontend: Products table updates to show new category assignments
Frontend: Category filter dropdown shows categories with product counts
Frontend: Filtering by category works correctly
Frontend: Select all works with filtered products
critical_code_review_comments: Backend uses MongoDB $addToSet for ADD mode to prevent duplicates
Backend uses $pull operator for REMOVE mode
Frontend correctly manages selected product IDs state
Dialog uses proper mode-specific button styling (red for remove)
Category hierarchy properly indented based on level
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing catalog 'd4b2c204-c9be-4d2f-8508-b8aaff68661a' with 80 products and 4 categories (Electrónica, Smartphones, iPhone, iPhone 15). Test data cleanup done by remove mode.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk category assignment feature is fully working. The endpoint POST /api/catalogs/{catalog_id}/products/bulk-categories supports 3 modes: 'add' (append), 'replace' (overwrite), 'remove' (delete specified). Frontend shows dialog with mode selector when products are selected. Category filter dropdown in catalog detail page works with product counts.

modes.add: Adds selected categories to existing ones using $addToSet
modes.replace: Replaces all categories with selected ones using $set

frontend_dialog.trigger: Select products via checkboxes, click 'Asignar a Categorías' button

category_filter.location: Catalog detail page search bar area

notes.no_mocked_functionality: All APIs are fully functional with MongoDB persistence
